cards.front: What is the purpose of adding a primary key constraint to the employee table?
cards.back: To uniquely identify each record in the employee table

cards.front: Which constraint is added to the employee table to ensure that all employee fields do not contain null values?
How many columns in the employee table should be used to create a primary key constraint?
What happens if you try to insert a duplicate primary key value into the employee table?
cards.back: SQL will reject the insert operation and display an error message

cards.front: What is the effect of adding a primary key constraint and not null constraint to the employee table?
cards.back: The employee table becomes more normalized and data integrity is improved
